title: bouteloua vaneedenii
intro: Bouteloua vaneedenii, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Bouteloua vaneedenii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin irritations and wounds.
